paragraphs.text: Stablecoin total supply reached $315.2B. USDC maintained 25.0% market share vs USDT 58.4%, leaving a 16.6% addressable base (~$52.4B) for institutional alternatives like USDGO.

paragraphs.text: STRATEGIC PRIORITY: US GENIUS Act breakthrough unlocks USDGO yield distribution. Top threat: Mastercard’s BVNK acquisition shows stablecoins are catching on - CFO Brew. Accelerate B2B pipeline.
